overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a cowboy character walking along a winding dirt trail through arid, rocky hills. The character passes another rider on horseback before continuing along a cliff edge with expansive views of a canyon and lake below.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding dirt trail between rocky outcrop and scattered trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt trail through the arid terrain, approaching a figure in the distance

entered.detail: large tan rock formation with layered sedimentary texture running alongside the trail
winding dirt path with cracked dry earth and scattered stones
green leafy trees scattered across the dry grassy hillside
hazy blue mountains visible on the horizon beyond the hills

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a cowboy character walking along a narrow dirt trail through arid, rocky terrain. A large rocky cliff face runs along the left side while scattered trees dot the right hillside. The path winds through dry grass with distant mountains visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: trail passing point with horseback rider

events.description: character approaches and passes a stationary rider on horseback standing on the trail

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail and passing a stationary rider on horseback who is positioned on the path ahead

notable_agents.action: rider on horseback standing stationary on the trail, facing toward the camera

entered.detail: opening in the terrain revealing a drop-off and distant water below

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the trail and passes a stationary rider on horseback. The terrain begins to open up on the right side, revealing the edge of a canyon. The rocky cliff remains prominent on the left while the trees fall behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliffside trail overlooking canyon lake and waterfall

events.description: trail opens to reveal expansive canyon with lake visible far below on the right
waterfall becomes visible in the distant canyon ahead

agents.ego_description: walking carefully along the cliff edge trail with expansive views of the canyon and water below

entered.detail: blue water of a lake or river visible in the canyon below the cliff edge
steep drop-off edge of the trail falling away to the canyon below
white waterfall cascading down the distant canyon wall

segments.scene_description: The trail continues along a dramatic cliff edge with expansive views of a canyon and blue lake below. The rocky cliff face remains on the left while the right side drops off steeply. As the character progresses, a distant waterfall becomes visible cascading down the canyon walls ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a narrow dirt trail that transforms from a confined rocky pass into an expansive cliffside vista. It begins with a cowboy walking through arid terrain, flanked by a towering rocky cliff on the left and scattered trees across a dry, grassy hillside. As the character progresses, the camera passes a stationary rider on horseback while the landscape on the right begins to open up. The scene then shifts to a dramatic cliff edge, where the hillside drops away to reveal a vast canyon and a shimmering blue lake below. Finally, the path continues along the precipice, keeping the rocky wall to the left as a distant waterfall becomes visible cascading down the canyon walls ahead.
